page_metadata.biotools__summary: The aim is to provide the most accurate translation for metabolic networks between GraphML (yEd) and SBGN-ML Process Description file formats. Translation in both direction is possible. This project should ultimately be integrated into the SBFC.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The aim is to provide the most accurate translation for metabolic networks between GraphML (yEd) and SBGN-ML Process Description file formats. Translation in both direction is possible. This project should ultimately be integrated into the SBFC.
